feed.title: Docket updates for IN RE: Glucagon-like Peptide-1 Receptor Agonists (GLP-1 RAs) Products Liability Litigation, MDL No. 3094
feed.rights: Created for the public domain by Free Law Project

entry.title: Minute entry from 2026-05-22 in IN RE: Glucagon-like Peptide-1 Receptor Agonists (GLP-1 RAs) Products Liability Litigation, MDL No. 3094
entry.summary: XYZ CASES ENTERED -- 1 related action(s) originating in the transferee district. JPML notified on 5/22/26 via NEF. -- Pennsylvania Eastern District Court (2:26-cv-03509) (JL)

entry.title: Entry #540 in IN RE: Glucagon-like Peptide-1 Receptor Agonists (GLP-1 RAs) Products Liability Litigation, MDL No. 3094
entry.summary: ***TEXT ONLY NOTICE******ALL CASE DOCUMENTS SHALL CONTAIN A PROOF OF SERVICE ON ALL PARTIES WHO DO NOT RECEIVE ELECTRONIC SERVICE THROUGH CM/ECF***NOTICE OF FILING OF CTO AND PUBLICATION OF BRIEFING SCHEDULE (CTO-81) re: pldg. ( 539 in MDL No. 3094, 1 in NJ/2:26-cv-05804) BRIEFING SCHEDULE IS SET AS FOLLOWS: Oppositions due on or before 5/29/2026.Attorneys must be registered to file in the JPML. Please visit our website for Registration Information. Signed by Clerk of the Panel Jessica D. Birnbaum on 5/22/2026. Associated Cases: MDL No. 3094, NJ/2:26-cv-05804 (JL) (Entered: 05/22/2026)
